titleStmt.title: SII 20.71: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 71. (B.K. No. 1 of 1937-38.) AGARKHĒḌ, INDI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up in the compound of Bhairappa temple.

summary.p: This record is dated Chālukya-Vikrama year 34, Virōdhin, Mārggaśira, Puṇṇame, Monday, lunar eclipse, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkrānti. The details are irregular. The saṁkrānti occurred on Saturday, December 25, A.D. 1109, when the tithi was Pushya, śu. 2. The eclipse occurred on November 9, Tuesday when the tithi was Kārttika puṇṇame. The intended date might be A.D. 1109, November 8, Monday, f.d.t., ·53.

The inscription records a remission of taxes on the land (aruvaṇa) of the temple of Svayaṁbhudēva at Khēḍa in the One Thousand division, by Lakshmīdhara-Bhaṭṭōpādhyāya, who was the preceptor of Yuvarāja Mallikārjunadēva, the eldest son of the king, to the same temple. The latter was then governing over the Tarddavāḍi1000 division. It further registers gifts of money income, taxes, etc., to the same temple by Mahāpradhāna, Permāḍiyarasa, Mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvara Gōvaṇarasa of the Siḷāra family whose genealogy also is given and by the Five Hundred Svāmis of Ayyāvoḷe and the Eight nāḍus.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© visuddhajñānarūpāya trivēdīdivyacakṣuṣē śrēyaḥ prāptya
nimittyāya namaḥ sōmārddhadhdhāriṇē . © svasti sama
stabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājā dhirājaṁ paraThe letter jā is engraved below the line.
mēsvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷu
kyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattribhuva namalladēvara vijeyarājyamuttarōThe letter va is engraved below the line.
ttarā(ṁ)bhivṛdhdhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ rājyaṁ
geyyuttamire . © tadagrajaṁ samastabhuvanajanavikhyātaṁ
cāḷukyānvayaprasūtaṁ parijanapārijātaṁ bhūpamāndhātaṁ ri
purāyakuvarabaṁgāṟaṁ bappanaṁkakāṟaṁ kumaraṁka
bhīmaṁ nayanābhirāmaṁ kuvaravēśyābhujaṁga(ṁ)nayyanasiṁgaṁ saraṇā
gatavajrapaṁjaraṁ kumāradikkuṁjaraṁ paravidyādhikaṁ sakaḷakaḷādha
raṁ padmanāḷagirivajradaṇḍa vīṣaḷarāyakuvarajavadaṇḍa mahāla
kṣmīdēvīlabdhavaraprasādaṁ tyāgavinōdaṁ mūṟurāyakumarahritse
llaṁ sāhasamallaṁ śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvara paṭṭamahādēviyaraṇu
gaṁ nāmādisamastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmadyuvarājaṁ mallikārjju
nadēvaru tarddavāḍisāsirava tribhōgābhyaṁtarasiddhiyiṁdāḷuttamire .
śrīmadyuvarāja mallikārjjunadēvara paramārādhyarappa śrīma
dayyaṁgaḷu lakṣmīdharabhaṭṭōpādyāyaru śrīmaccāḷukya
vikramavarṣada 34 neya virōdhi saṁvatsarada mārggasirada puṇname
sōmavāradaṁdu sōmagrahaṇa Uttarāyaṇasaṁkrāṁtiyandu
mahādānanimittaṁ sahasragrāmasīmāntamappondadaḍakke modala
ya khēḍada svayaṁbhudēvara Eṁbhattu mattaru keyya Aruvaṇa
maṁ dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi sarvvanamasyamāgi dēvargge biṭṭar .
© svasti samastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ tisaḷa
leya permmāḍiyarasaru khēḍada mēlāḷkeya siddhā
yadalu varṣaṁprati sayaṁbhudēvara bhōgakkekuḍuva gadyāṇa Āṟu
© śrīkopaṇapuravarēśvara lōkaśikhāmaṇi viyaccarānvaya
tiḷakaṁ prakaṭayaśa śiḷaṟadivākaranudiyisidaneḷege piṭṭamaneṁba . Ā
tana vaṁśajaroḷu vikhyātayaśaṁ negaḻdirddā nāgārjjunanintātaṁgiṁdaranaṁdana
nātana sutanāptaṁ kaṁcigaṁ kavilāsa . Ā kaṁcigakavilāsaṁgaṁkada babbasa
navaṁge rakkasamati nissaṁkaṁ tadagrajanindaraniṁ kiṟiya gōvaṇaṁ śiḷāṟa narēṁ�
Ā gōvaṇaṁge maruḷuviṭṭanuṁ kavilāsanumeṁdirbbaru tanūjarādā kavilā
saṁge dvādasasahasratuṁgaturagamāvatanuṁ Āsītisahasrasubhaṭabaḷapa
dātibaḷanuṁ mukheyarāyacamatkāranuṁ manneyavallabhanuṁmenisida
piriya dhanasaṁgrahane maga(ṁ)nindaparasanātana magaṁ piriya ḍākara
saniṁ baḷiya maruḷuviṭṭana vaṁśajaṁ piriya gōvaṇanagrajaṁ mahāmaṇḍaḷēśva
raṁ vīramāhēśvaraṁ nālvaḍicaladaṁkarāmaṁ kaviyataḷakkanenisideraḍe
dhanasaṁgrahana maga samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēsvaraṁ tagaranaga
rādhīsvaraṁ jīmūtavāhanānvayaprasūtaṁ sauryyaraghujātaṁ śiḷāṟaku
ḷakamaḷamārttaṇḍaṁ kadanapracaṇḍaṁ manneyavallabhaṁ permmaḍimanōraṁjana
sattumadabhaṁjanaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēsvaraṁ gōvaṇarasaniṁnavarakīrtti
yayyaṁ maṇḍaḷēsvaraṁ gōṣṭada kavilāsana magaṁ mahāmaṇḍaḷēsvaraṁ ḍākarasa
nātana magaṁ samadhigatapaṁcamahāsabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēsvaraṁ tagaranagarā
dhīsvaraṁ jīmūtavāhanānvayaprasūtaṁ sauryyaraphujātaṁ śiḷāṟakuḷa
kamaḷamārttaṇḍaṁ samarapracaṇḍaṁ kātyāyanīlabdhavaraprasādaṁ dānavi
nōdaṁ sanivārasidhdhi manneyavallabhaṁ dhanegana siṁgaṁ śrīmadyuvarāja ma

llikārjjunadēvapādābjabhriṁgaṁ nā
mādisamastaprasastisahitaṁ śrī
manmahāmaṇḍaḷēsvaraṁ gōvaṇara
saru panneraḍaṟa modala khē
ḍada sayaṁbhudēvara Eṁbhattu
mattaru keyya mānyadeṟeyaṁ
dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi sarvvana
maśyamāgi dēvargge biṭṭaru ma
ttaṁ khēḍada manneyada siddhāya
dalu sayambhudēvara bhōgakke
varṣaṁprati kuḍuva gadyāṇa hattu
© svasti samastabhuvanavikhyāta
pancasatavīrasāsanarappa śrīma
daynūrvvasvāmigaḷu Eṁṭunāḍa
varuṁ khēḍa taḷa mukhya
rāgi sayambhudēvara nivēdyakke
māḍida bha
ra Eraḍu hakkalada
hattiya maḷave
yvattu . Īdharmmamanā
pratipāḷisidaravara
Aḷidavaṁ kurukṣētradoḷu vā
raṇāsiyoḷu pasuvaṁ brāhmaṇa
rumanaḷidanajagujigiḷida .
sāsanamideṁdedelliya sāsana(ṁ)
mārittarēke salisuve nānī sāsana
neṁba durjjanarā sakaḷa
gaḷagaḷaniḷivaru .
dattaṁ vā yō ha
dharāṁ ṣaṣṭi ha
ṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ
Digital edition of SII 20.71 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
